hypothesis: Diffusion-model-generated crystal structures trained on Materials Project and OQMD data will, after DFT relaxation, exhibit small RMSD from the initial geometries, pass stability/novelty and validity criteria (SUN stability, low energy above hull, and minimum interatomic distances >0.5 Å), and have density and formation-energy distributions comparable to the reference data, indicating they are physically plausible and energetically realistic.
